crime.note: police.uk bulk street-level crime archive (open data, no API key); cached under the data directory via archive_path('latest').

poi.note: Overture Maps places (POI), streamed from S3 via the overturemaps reader (no API key). bbox is England & Wales in WGS-84 (xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax).

oa.label: Output Areas 2021 Census (Dec 2021, EW, BGC V2)

greenspace.note: OS Open Greenspace, OS Downloads API (open data, no API key). BNG (EPSG:27700).

roads.note: OS Open Roads, OS Downloads API (open data, no API key).

land_cover.note: UKCEH Land Cover Map vector GeoPackage. Licensed (EIDC) so manually downloaded into the data directory; the build reads the .gpkg inside the zip. BNG (EPSG:27700).

retail_centres.note: GeoDS Retail Centre Boundaries. Licensed (Geographic Data Service) so manually downloaded into the data directory. Supplied in WGS-84 (EPSG:4326); reprojected to BNG (EPSG:27700) on load.

schools.note: GIAS 'Get Information About Schools' export (open data). The 'Establishment fields CSV' is published daily at a {date}-stamped (YYYYMMDD) URL; the loader downloads today's (falling back to yesterday's) and caches it in the data directory.

imd.note: English Indices of Deprivation 2025 'File 7' (open data, gov.uk).

oac.note: 2021 Output Area Classification (GeoDS). Requires a login (https://data.geods.ac.uk/), so the per-OA codes (oac21ew.csv → the `oac` table, keyed by oa21cd) and the codes-and-names lookup (classification_codes_and_names-1.csv → the `oac_classification` dimension table) are manually downloaded into the data directory's raw folder. Attribute-only.

naptan.note: NAPTAN national public-transport access nodes (DfT, open data, no API key). The national CSV is published at a fixed URL (https://beta-naptan.dft.gov.uk/download/national); the loader downloads it and caches it under the data directory's raw folder. Coordinates supplied in BNG (Easting/Northing, EPSG:27700).

takeaways.note: FSA Food Hygiene Rating Scheme open data, whole-country CSV (https://ratings.food.gov.uk/open-data; open data, no API key). Filtered to takeaways (BusinessTypeID 7844) in England & Wales: SchemeType FHRS drops Scotland (FHIS), and BT postcodes drop Northern Ireland. Coordinates supplied in WGS-84 (Latitude/Longitude); reprojected to BNG (EPSG:27700).

wimd.note: Welsh Index of Multiple Deprivation 2025 index and domain scores by small area (open data, gov.wales).
